perfectPractice.headline: You keep trash-talking the customer's current tool
reasons: This happened on 4 calls, and all of them were lost because you attacked the tools they already use: [1][2][3][4]
Instead, asking about their issues works much better, winning about 9 of 10 times: [1]
During one call, you told Nina Becker from Cobalt Finance that Microsoft Teams is bloated and slow, but that approach did not help you win the sale: [1]

citations.quote: Honestly, Microsoft Teams is bloated and slow.
I get that, but imagine how much more efficient your team could be with a tool that doesn’t feel like a chore to use.
Honestly, Google Chat is bloated and slow.
Honestly, Discord is bloated and slow.
